M-WEB-API.NAME: HTTP API
M-WEB-API.Purpose: Expose Cowboy routes for request intake, token verification, health checks, and HTML responses.

Scope.Item: Validate inputs and map errors to user-readable responses
Render `/verify` success and failure pages as readable UTF-8 Russian HTML
Pass the private per-SNI salt into proxy issuance so reused users receive refreshed derived credentials
Coordinate token, email, registry, and provisioning workflows

Interfaces.Interface: Accepts email and triggers magic-link delivery.
Consumes token and renders final result.

Risks.Risk: Replay or malformed token handling can leak inconsistent state
Backend errors must not expose secrets
Derived credential rollout must not leave `/verify` issuing links that the MTProto listener still treats as raw-secret incompatible
Encoding corruption in `/verify` bodies can block successful user onboarding even when issuance succeeds
